title: Improve automatic visibility accessibility for color blindness
excerpt: The UI needs to be improved to automatically add contrast  to fonts vs colors to for accessibility for color blindness

posts.author: marcusjaxn (Marcus Jaxn)
posts.cookedHtml:
The UI needs to be improved to automatically add contrast to fonts vs colors to for accessibility for color blindness

colorblind1105×182 39.4 KB

posts.author: jezmynne (Jezmynne Amergin)
posts.cookedHtml: Please! It would be great to have a toggle to turn on/off colors. The colors are a real problem for my team.

posts.author: AudreyHB (Audrey Hornick-Becker)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes! Monday.com needs a colorblind mode! It’s crucial to expand Monday.com’s accessibility in this way. Color categorizing is a big part of Monday.com, which makes it very difficult for team members who are colorblind.
